steps.title: Pair youth with judgment
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that Elinor is only nineteen yet acts as her mother's counselor, gives effective advice, has cool judgment, and governs her feelings better than her mother can.

steps.title: Eliminate unsupported claims
steps.content: A contradicts "effectual" advice. B contradicts her cool judgment and self-control. C invents Elinor's opinion of her mother. The supported point is her unusual maturity for her age. The answer is D.
